title: pelargonium × humei
intro: Pelargonium × humei, also known as Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and promoting a good night's sleep. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used in aromatherapy and herbal medicine.
